compulsory.name: Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number
compulsory.when_to_ask: Always, at the beginning of claim intake

compulsory.name: Proof of Purchase (Plan and iPhone)
compulsory.when_to_ask: If not already validated automatically; request user upload or reference
compulsory.notes: Proof of purchase may be required to confirm eligibility.

compulsory.name: Description of Symptoms / Issue
compulsory.when_to_ask: Always; to determine if defect, ADH, or excluded cause
compulsory.notes: Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.).

compulsory.name: Responses to Diagnostic Questions
compulsory.notes: Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken.

compulsory.name: Accident Details (for ADH claims)
compulsory.when_to_ask: If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage
compulsory.notes: Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event.

compulsory.name: Service Fee Payment (for ADH claims)
compulsory.when_to_ask: At confirmation stage if claim type is ADH
compulsory.notes: USD $49 (CAD $49 in Canada) + tax. Claim cannot be processed without payment.

compulsory.name: Agreement to Service Instructions
compulsory.when_to_ask: Before finalizing claim handoff to Apple
compulsory.notes: Confirm user will follow packing/shipping rules and not send accessories.

optional.name: iOS Version and Update Status
optional.when_to_ask: For technical issues or before escalating
optional.notes: User must update to currently published release prior to service.

optional.name: Backup Confirmation
optional.notes: Remind customer Apple will erase data during repair; backup required.

optional.name: Credit Card Authorization
optional.when_to_ask: If Express Replacement Service is requested
optional.notes: Hold placed for retail price of replacement until old device returned.

optional.name: Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)
optional.when_to_ask: If accident description is vague or edge case scenario
optional.policy_reference: Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)

optional.name: Customs/Import Information
optional.when_to_ask: If claim is filed while customer is abroad
optional.notes: Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes.

flow: Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).
Collect proof of purchase if not already on file (C2).
Ask user to describe the issue (C3).
If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (C5).
If ADH: confirm service fee payment (C6).
Before submitting claim: confirm compliance with Apple’s service instructions (C7).
If issue type matches optional scenarios (battery, software, express replacement, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O1–O6).
bot_behavior_guidelines.fallback: If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms.
